title: Job Vacancies at Kursi Trades Services Limited
content:
Kursi Trades Services Limited  is a registered organization with the Corporate Affairs Commission in Nigeria and operates in the solid minerals sector.Our company is involved in sourcing, processing, and supply of minerals such as tin, columbite, monazite and other related mineral resources.Our operations are based in Jos, where we run a mineral buying centre and processing facility.Kursi trades services is committed to maintaining safe operations, efficient processes, and contributing to the development of Nigeria’s solid minerals industry.

We are recruiting to fill the following positions below:

1.) Laboratory Assistant
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Job Location: Jos, Plateau
Department: Laboratory / Quality Control
Reports To: Laboratory Supervisor / Quality Control Manager

Job Purpose


	The Laboratory Assistant supports laboratory operations by supervising the preparation, handling, and analyzing mineral samples to ensure accurate testing and quality control of tin, columbite, zircon, monazite and other mineral products.
	The role ensures compliance with safety standards, testing procedures, and regulatory requirements.


Key Responsibilities


	Receive, label, and log mineral samples from suppliers.
	Supervise the preparation of samples for analysis (crushing, pulverizing, and weighing).
	Assist in conducting physical and chemical tests on tin, columbite, monazite and other minerals.
	Record and maintain accurate laboratory test results and documentation.
	Maintain laboratory equipment and ensure proper calibration.
	Observe and enforce laboratory safety and environmental standards.
	Assist in quality control checks on processed mineral output.
	Dispose of laboratory waste in accordance with safety and environmental regulations.
	Maintain cleanliness and orderliness of the laboratory.
	Report any equipment malfunction or irregular test results to the supervisor.


Performance Metrics


	Accuracy of sample preparation and test results
	Compliance with safety regulations
	Timeliness in processing samples
	Proper documentation and record keeping
	Equipment maintenance and handling efficiency.


Requirements
Education:


	Minimum of B.Sc. in Chemistry, Geology, Metallurgy, Mineral Processing, or related field.


Experience:


	Basic knowledge of mineral testing and laboratory procedures.
	Familiarity with safety standards in mining environments.
	Must be done with NYSC and willing to learn.


Skills:


	Attention to detail
	Basic analytical skills
	Ability to handle laboratory equipment
	Good record-keeping ability
	Physical stamina (ability to work in mining site conditions)
	Strong adherence to safety procedures
	Teamwork and communication skills.


Click here to apply online

Note


	This job description is not exhaustive and may be modified as per the organization’s need.
	Additional duties and responsibilities may be assigned to the role required to support the organization’s objectives.
	All Kursi Group staff are expected to demonstrate flexibility and willingness to perform appropriate tasks when the need arises.


 

 

2.) Air Float Machine Operator

Job Location: Jos, Plateau
Department: Mineral Processing / Plant Operations
Reports To: Plant Supervisor / Chief Process Operator

Job Summary


	The Air Float Machine Operator is responsible for operating and monitoring the air floatation equipment to separate minerals (tin, columbite, zircon, and other ores) based on density and chemical properties.
	The role ensures optimal machine performance, accurate mineral separation, and compliance with operational, safety, and environmental standards.
	The operator supports production efficiency by maintaining equipment, troubleshooting minor faults, and reporting irregularities.


Key Responsibilities


	Set up, operate, and monitor the air floatation machine according to standard operating procedures.
	Feed mineral slurry into the machine at correct rates and observe separation efficiency.
	Adjust air flow, chemical dosing, and machine parameters to optimize mineral recovery.
	Conduct routine checks and basic maintenance of the machine (lubrication, cleaning, inspection).
	Record daily operational data, production output, and quality reports.
	Identify and report mechanical or process irregularities to the supervisor.
	Ensure adherence to safety, environmental, and site operational standards.
	Maintain cleanliness and organization of the processing area.


Performance Metrics


	Consistency in mineral recovery rates
	Machine uptime and operational efficiency
	Compliance with safety and environmental standards
	Accuracy of production and process records.


Requirements
Education:


	Minimum of OND / NCE / HND in Mineral Processing, Metallurgy, Mining Engineering, or related field.


Experience:


	1–3 years of experience operating mineral processing equipment, preferably air float machines.
	Basic mechanical and process knowledge of mineral separation techniques.
	Familiarity with safety and environmental regulations in mining operations.


Skills:


	Attention to detail and process monitoring skills
	Mechanical aptitude and troubleshooting ability
	Ability to follow operational and safety procedures
	Good record-keeping and reporting skills
	Physical stamina for plant floor work
	Teamwork and communication skills


Application Closing Date: 13th March, 2026.

Click here to apply online

 

3.) Rapid Magnetic Separator Operator

Job Location: Jos, Plateau
Department: Mineral Processing / Plant Operations
Reports To: Plant Supervisor / Chief Process Operator

Job Summary


	The Rapid Magnetic Separator Operator is responsible for operating, monitoring, and maintaining the rapid magnetic separation equipment used to extract magnetic minerals from ore streams, including tin, columbite, zircon, and other minerals.
	The role ensures optimal machine performance, high mineral recovery rates, and strict adherence to safety, operational, and environmental standards.
	The operator assists in troubleshooting minor faults and ensures accurate recording of operational data.


Key Responsibilities


	Set up and operate the rapid magnetic separator according to standard operating procedures.
	Feed mineral slurry into the separator at the correct rate and monitor separation efficiency.
	Adjust machine parameters such as magnetic intensity, feed rate, and rotor speed to optimize recovery.
	Perform routine checks, cleaning, and basic maintenance of the separator.
	Identify and report equipment faults, irregularities, or performance issues to the supervisor.
	Maintain accurate records of operational data, production output, and mineral recovery.
	Ensure strict compliance with safety, health, and environmental standards.
	Maintain cleanliness and organization of the processing area.


Performance Metrics


	Consistency and efficiency of mineral recovery rates.
	Machine uptime and operational reliability.
	Compliance with safety and environmental regulations.
	Accuracy of operational records and reporting.


Requirements
Education:


	OND / HND / B.Sc Degree in Mineral Processing, Metallurgy, Mining Engineering, or related fields.


Experience:


	1 - 3 years of experience operating magnetic separation or mineral processing equipment.
	Knowledge of mineral processing techniques and machinery operation.
	Familiarity with safety and environmental regulations in mining/processing sites.


Skills & Competencies:


	Technical aptitude and mechanical understanding of processing equipment
	Strong attention to detail and process monitoring skills
	Ability to follow operational and safety procedures
	Good record-keeping and reporting skills
	Physical stamina and ability to work in industrial/mining site conditions
	Teamwork and communication skills.


Click here to apply online    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "description": "BT Health and Diagnostic Centre (BTHDC)&nbsp;is an ultra-modern Diagnostic Center facility which provides Radiology and laboratory services at Lagos State University Teaching Hospital (LASUTH), Ikeja Lagos.&nbsp;BTHDC is a Public Private Partnership (PPP) between PPC Limited and Lagos State Government. PPC Limited is affiliated to Philips Medical System (PMS), a global leader in providing clinical management and diagnostic technology, and have been successful in transferring latest technology to the healthcare industry in Nigeria.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Procurement Manager

Job Location:&nbsp;Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities
Procurement Planning and Strategy:


	Develop and implement procurement strategies aligned with the diagnostic centre&rsquo;s operational needs.
	Prepare and manage the procurement budget in collaboration with finance and department heads.
	Forecast supply needs based on operational demands and patient volume.


Vendor Management:


	Identify, evaluate, and onboard reliable vendors and suppliers for medical equipment, laboratory reagents, consumables, and general supplies.
	Maintain strong relationships with suppliers to ensure competitive pricing and reliable delivery.
	Conduct periodic vendor performance reviews.


Purchasing and Contract Management:


	Source and procure diagnostic equipment, reagents, pharmaceuticals, consumables, and office supplies.
	Negotiate pricing, terms, and contracts with suppliers to achieve cost savings and value for money.
	Ensure procurement processes follow organizational policies and regulatory requirements.


Inventory Coordination:


	Work closely with the inventory/store unit to ensure optimal stock levels of medical supplies and reagents.
	Monitor stock usage trends to prevent stock-outs or overstocking.
	Support inventory audits and stock reconciliation processes.


Quality Assurance and Compliance:


	Ensure all procured medical supplies and equipment meet regulatory standards and quality specifications.
	Verify that suppliers comply with relevant health, safety, and regulatory requirements.
	Ensure documentation and procurement records are properly maintained.


Cost Control and Reporting:


	Track procurement expenses and identify opportunities for cost reduction.
	Prepare procurement reports and analysis for management review.
	Ensure transparency and accountability in procurement activities.


Collaboration with Clinical and Administrative Units:


	Liaise with laboratory, radiology, nursing, and administrative teams to understand supply needs.
	Ensure timely procurement of specialized diagnostic reagents and equipment required for clinical operations.


Qualifications


	Interested candidates should possess a Bachelor&#39;s or Master&#39;s Degree with 3-6 years of experience.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;recruitment@bthdc.com.ng&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Procurement Manager Job at BT Health and Diagnostic Centre (BTHDC)




        
    

        
        BT Health and Diagnostic Centre (BTHDC) is an ultra-modern Diagnostic Center facility which provides Radiology and laboratory services at Lagos State University Teaching Hospital (LASUTH), Ikeja Lagos. BTHDC is a Public Private Partnership (PPP) between PPC Limited and Lagos State Government. PPC Limited is affiliated to Philips Medical System (PMS), a global leader in providing clinical management and diagnostic technology, and have been successful in transferring latest technology to the healthcare industry in Nigeria.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Procurement Manager

Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Key Responsibilities
Procurement Planning and Strategy:


	Develop and implement procurement strategies aligned with the diagnostic centre’s operational needs.
	Prepare and manage the procurement budget in collaboration with finance and department heads.
	Forecast supply needs based on operational demands and patient volume.


Vendor Management:


	Identify, evaluate, and onboard reliable vendors and suppliers for medical equipment, laboratory reagents, consumables, and general supplies.
	Maintain strong relationships with suppliers to ensure competitive pricing and reliable delivery.
	Conduct periodic vendor performance reviews.


Purchasing and Contract Management:


	Source and procure diagnostic equipment, reagents, pharmaceuticals, consumables, and office supplies.
	Negotiate pricing, terms, and contracts with suppliers to achieve cost savings and value for money.
	Ensure procurement processes follow organizational policies and regulatory requirements.


Inventory Coordination:


	Work closely with the inventory/store unit to ensure optimal stock levels of medical supplies and reagents.
	Monitor stock usage trends to prevent stock-outs or overstocking.
	Support inventory audits and stock reconciliation processes.


Quality Assurance and Compliance:


	Ensure all procured medical supplies and equipment meet regulatory standards and quality specifications.
	Verify that suppliers comply with relevant health, safety, and regulatory requirements.
	Ensure documentation and procurement records are properly maintained.


Cost Control and Reporting:


	Track procurement expenses and identify opportunities for cost reduction.
	Prepare procurement reports and analysis for management review.
	Ensure transparency and accountability in procurement activities.


Collaboration with Clinical and Administrative Units:


	Liaise with laboratory, radiology, nursing, and administrative teams to understand supply needs.
	Ensure timely procurement of specialized diagnostic reagents and equipment required for clinical operations.


Qualifications


	Interested candidates should possess a Bachelor's or Master's Degree with 3-6 years of experience.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: recruitment@bthdc.com.ng using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

Receptionist Job at Premium Human Resources Solution Limited




        
    

        
        Premium Human Resources Solution - Our client, a top Firm, is recruiting suitable candidates to fill the position below:

Job Position: Receptionist

Job Location: Lagos

Key Responsibilities

	Greet and assist visitors in a friendly and professional manner.
	Answer and direct phone calls, emails, and inquiries.
	Manage appointment scheduling and maintain meeting room bookings.
	Handle incoming and outgoing mail or deliveries.
	Maintain reception area cleanliness and orderliness.
	Provide basic administrative support such as filing, photocopying, and data entry.
	Assist with coordinating office activities when required.

	Experience: One - Three years of proven experience is required.

	Professional appearance and positive attitude.


Benefits

Note


	Kindly fill in the required information if you are interested and qualified.
	Read instructions carefully!!

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Senior Devops Engineer",
  "description": "Software Business Solutions Consulting (SBSC) is a boutique, minority-owned and managed, consulting firm, working with global clients to uncover opportunities and solve problems. We are experts in the areas of: Application Development, Application Support, Business Strategy, Program &amp; Project Management, Business Intelligence, Mobile Application, and Help Desk/Customer Service. We use this expertise and our experience in various industries, such as Healthcare, Financial Services, Retail, Travel, Transport, Logistics and Insurance, to provide results that businesses need.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position:&nbsp;Senior Devops Engineer&nbsp;

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

About the job


	We are looking for an experienced Senior DevOps Engineer with strong skills in systems architecture, documentation, and automation. The role involves managing cloud infrastructure, improving deployment processes, and maintaining clear and detailed technical documentation for enterprise systems.


Responsibilities


	Build and manage CI/CD pipelines using tools like Jenkins, GitLab, or Azure DevOps.
	Deploy and maintain systems using Kubernetes, Docker, and Terraform.
	Create and update architecture diagrams, process flows, and technical documentation.
	Monitor and optimize system performance, uptime, and security.
	Work closely with development and architecture teams to ensure scalable and reliable deployments.
	Implement automated monitoring, alerts, and backup strategies.
	Ensure compliance with security and data protection standards.


Requirements


	6+ years of DevOps or Systems Engineering experience.
	Strong knowledge of Kubernetes, Docker, Terraform, CI/CD tools, and cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, or GCP).
	Proven ability to document infrastructure and architecture clearly and professionally.
	Experience in microservices environments and API management.
	Excellent problem-solving and communication skills.


Nice to Have:


	Certifications in AWS, Azure, or Google Cloud.
	Experience in fintech or banking environments.
	Familiarity with security compliance frameworks (ISO 27001, SOC 2, etc.).


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;oaina@sbsc.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

Senior Devops Engineer Job at Software Business Solutions Consulting




        
    

        
        Software Business Solutions Consulting (SBSC) is a boutique, minority-owned and managed, consulting firm, working with global clients to uncover opportunities and solve problems. We are experts in the areas of: Application Development, Application Support, Business Strategy, Program & Project Management, Business Intelligence, Mobile Application, and Help Desk/Customer Service. We use this expertise and our experience in various industries, such as Healthcare, Financial Services, Retail, Travel, Transport, Logistics and Insurance, to provide results that businesses need.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Senior Devops Engineer 
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

About the job


	We are looking for an experienced Senior DevOps Engineer with strong skills in systems architecture, documentation, and automation. The role involves managing cloud infrastructure, improving deployment processes, and maintaining clear and detailed technical documentation for enterprise systems.


Responsibilities


	Build and manage CI/CD pipelines using tools like Jenkins, GitLab, or Azure DevOps.
	Deploy and maintain systems using Kubernetes, Docker, and Terraform.
	Create and update architecture diagrams, process flows, and technical documentation.
	Monitor and optimize system performance, uptime, and security.
	Work closely with development and architecture teams to ensure scalable and reliable deployments.
	Implement automated monitoring, alerts, and backup strategies.
	Ensure compliance with security and data protection standards.


Requirements


	6+ years of DevOps or Systems Engineering experience.
	Strong knowledge of Kubernetes, Docker, Terraform, CI/CD tools, and cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, or GCP).
	Proven ability to document infrastructure and architecture clearly and professionally.
	Experience in microservices environments and API management.
	Excellent problem-solving and communication skills.


Nice to Have:


	Certifications in AWS, Azure, or Google Cloud.
	Experience in fintech or banking environments.
	Familiarity with security compliance frameworks (ISO 27001, SOC 2, etc.).


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: oaina@sbsc.com using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

Led by our visionary Chief Executive Officer, Dr. Ebenezer Oluwagbemiga, our team of seasoned professionals brings deep expertise in environmental quality management, marine operations, and oil &amp; gas services.

For nearly two decades, we have built a reputation for reliability, innovation, and commitment to sustainable development &mdash; transforming challenges into opportunities for Nigeria and Africa.

Accountant Job at Ebenco Group Limited




        
    

        
        Ebenco Group Limited is a proudly Nigerian indigenous oil and gas company incorporated in 2006 with the Corporate Affairs Commission to deliver integrated energy services across the value chain. We specialize in petroleum, industrial, medical, and domestic waste management, environmental consultancy, petroleum products marketing and supply, pollution control, haulage, and marine services. Led by our visionary Chief Executive Officer, Dr. Ebenezer Oluwagbemiga, our team of seasoned professionals brings deep expertise in environmental quality management, marine operations, and oil & gas services.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



For nearly two decades, we have built a reputation for reliability, innovation, and commitment to sustainable development — transforming challenges into opportunities for Nigeria and Africa.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Accountant

Job Location: Delta
Employment Type: Full-time

Requirements


	Interested candidates should possess relevant qualifications.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV  to: hr.admin@ebencogroupltd.com using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply
